rationale: Section governs revenue bonds payable solely from real property sale proceeds, explicitly excluding tax revenue per Subsection (g). Homestead exemption changes affect tax valuations, not these bond provisions.
quote: The bonds may be payable only from the revenues described by Subsection (a) and may not be payable or paid from any taxes levied and collected in the district.
_note: No conflict. These bonds are secured by sale-of-real-property proceeds, not ad valorem taxes, so homestead exemption changes do not affect this section.
